# Load the six_hadith_books.json file
import json, os, sys, re
path = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    data = json.load(f)
len(data), type(data)

# Let's implement normalization and search
import re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
def remove_diacritics(text):
    # remove Arabic diacritics (tashkeel) and some control characters
    # Unicode ranges for Arabic diacritics:  0x064B-0x0652 etc.
    # We'll remove chars in the Unicode category 'Mn' (Mark, Nonspacing)
    # But ensure we don't remove letter-like marks such as hamza above? Hamza is a letter.
    # Also remove tatweel (U+0640)
    text = re.sub('\u0640','', text)  # tatweel
    # Remove diacritics using regex covering known tashkeel and other combining marks
    # Range: 0x0610-0x061A , 0x064B-0x065F, 0x0670-0x06D3? We'll remove categories Mn
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', text) if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    return text

# But unicodedata may not decompose Arabic marks; better to explicitly remove known diacritics.
tashkeel = ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x06D6, 0x06DC+1)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x06DF, 0x06E8+1)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x06EA, 0x06ED+1)]) + '\u0670'
# build regex
tashkeel_re = re.compile('[%s]' % re.escape(tashkeel))
def remove_diacritics2(text):
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')  # tatweel
    text = tashkeel_re.sub('', text)
    return text

# Normalize hamza variants: convert to bare 'ء' maybe or 'ا' for forms on alif. 
# We'll normalize to 'ا' for hamzat al-waṣl? Hmm safer to replace hamza variants with 'ء'?
# We'll map: أ, إ, آ, ؤ, ئ, ء -> 'ء' or maybe keep medial positions. We'll map all to 'ء'.
def normalize_hamza(text):
    return re.sub('[أإآىؤئ]', 'ء', text)

# remove punctuation, diacritics, parentheses, colons, commas, quotes, etc
punct = r'''!"#\$%&\(\)\*\+,\-./:;<=>\?@\[\\\]\^_`{\|}~–—«»'،؛؟…·٬ـ'''
punct_re = re.compile('['+punct + r'\u060C\u061B\u061F' + r']') # but included Arabic comma etc
def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    text = str(text)
    text = remove_diacritics2(text)
    text = text.replace('\n',' ').replace('\r',' ')
    text = punct_re.sub(' ', text)
    text = text.replace('ـ','')  # tatweel
    text = normalize_hamza(text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub('\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# testing
s = "أُذِنَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَتَزَيَّنَ بِزِينَتَيْنِ: سِرْبَالًا يُقَمَّصُ بِهِ، وَمَرْكَبًا يُلْجَمُ بِهِ"
print(normalize_arabic(s))

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
input_full = "أُذِنَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَتَزَيَّنَ بِزِينَتَيْنِ: سِرْبَالًا يُقَمَّصُ بِهِ، وَمَرْكَبًا يُلْجَمُ بِهِ"
input_snippet = "أُذِنَ لِل...ْجَمُ بِهِ"  # snippet from user
norm_full = normalize_arabic(input_full)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic(input_snippet)
norm_full, norm_snip

# compute similarity measures for each entry
def token_f1(a,b):
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    if not a_tokens or not b_tokens:
        return 0.0
    a_set = {}
    for t in a_tokens:
        a_set[t] = a_set.get(t,0)+1
    b_set = {}
    for t in b_tokens:
        b_set[t] = b_set.get(t,0)+1
    common = 0
    for t,c in a_set.items():
        if t in b_set:
            common += min(c, b_set[t])
    prec = common / len(a_tokens)
    rec = common / len(b_tokens)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

scores = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    hadithTxt = entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    Matn = entry.get('Matn') or ''
    text = (hadithTxt + " " + Matn).strip()
    norm_text = normalize_arabic(text)
    # compute similarity
    seq_ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_full, norm_text).ratio()
    tf1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm_text)
    # also compute for snippet
    seq_ratio_snip = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_snip, norm_text).ratio()
    tf1_snip = token_f1(norm_snip, norm_text)
    # store
    scores.append((i, seq_ratio, tf1, seq_ratio_snip, tf1_snip, text[:200]))
# sort by seq_ratio descending
top = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:30]
top[:20]

# Find entries that contain raw words (with or without diacritics) using simple substring search (case sensitive)
candidates = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    hadithTxt = entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    Matn = entry.get('Matn') or ''
    text = hadithTxt + " " + Matn
    # if any of the words, append
    if ("مَرْكَب" in text) or ("سِرْبَال" in text) or ("سِرْبَالًا" in text) or ("سِرْبَال" in text) or ("قَمَّص" in text) or ("قَمَّصُ" in text) or ("يُلْجَم" in text) or ("يُلْجَمُ" in text) or ("أُذِنَ" in text):
        candidates.append((i, text[:200]))
len(candidates), candidates[:20]

# Inspect some entries for Matn
for i in range(0,20):
    entry = data[i]
    print(i, "hadithID:", entry.get('hadithID') )
    print("Matn:", entry.get('Matn')[:200])
    print("hadithTxt:", entry.get('hadithTxt')[:200])
    print("----")

for i in range(0,20):
    entry = data[i]
    print("Index", i)
    print("Keys:", entry.keys())
    print("Matn sample:", repr(entry.get('Matn')[:200]) if entry.get('Matn') else None)
    print("hadithTxt sample:", repr(entry.get('hadithTxt')[:200]) if entry.get('hadithTxt') else None)
    print("---")

# Precompute normalized Matn for all entries
norm_matns = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    matn = entry.get('Matn') or ''
    norm = normalize_arabic(matn)
    norm_matns.append(norm)

# Search for certain tokens
keywords_norm = ['يتزين','زينتين','سربال','سربالا','سربالاً','سِرْبَال','مركب','مركبا','يقمص','يقمص','يلجم','يلْجَم','يلجمُ']
found_idxs = set()
for i,n in enumerate(norm_matns):
    for kw in keywords_norm:
        if kw in n:
            found_idxs.add(i)
            break
len(found_idxs)

# print those entries
for idx in sorted(found_idxs):
    entry = data[idx]
    print("Index:", idx)
    print("hadithID:", entry.get('hadithID'))
    print("Matn:", entry.get('Matn'))
    print("Normalized:", norm_matns[idx])
    print("---")

top_tf1 = sorted(((i, token_f1(norm_full, n), n[:200]) for i,n in enumerate(norm_matns)), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:50]
top_tf1[:20]
